The short version

We're doing the thing!

Three years of travelling the world together, one shared Excel finance sheet we genuinely consider entertainment, and a long list of "big plans" - Herman and Melissa are making it official.

Our parents have called us the lovebirds for years. In June 2027, on a Greek beach, we're finally giving them a reason to put it on a cake.

We currently live in the Netherlands. Emphasis on "currently" - the suitcases are never fully unpacked, and the next adventure is always already half-booked.

Bali, 2023 - the lovebirds. Literally. 🐦

The where & when

Here's the plan

📍

The Venue

Hydra Bay Resort
Greece 🇬🇷

Open in Maps ↗
📅

The Dates

9-10-11-12-13 June 2027
A four-nights wedding holiday

✈️

Getting There

Fly to Athens (ATH), then it's a scenic ~3hr drive to Pigadia. Book flights early - get good deals!

🛏️

Where to Stay

You'll need to book your own hotel - there just aren't enough beds at the villa for everyone. But you're welcome to hang out with us there any time, any day, no invitation needed twice.

Nearby hotel picks below ↓
📅 Add to Google Calendar 📆 Add to Apple/Outlook Calendar
Some Options

A few nearby picks

We're in Pigadia (Thermisia), on the mainland facing Hydra island - not on Hydra itself, so no ferries needed. It's a small area and June books up, so grab a spot early. Here are a few picks at different price points, all a short drive from the villa.

🏖️

V&E's Apartments

Self-catering apartments right on Pigadia Beach, a few minutes' walk from the villa - sea views, private beach access, easy on the budget.

Book on Booking.com ↗
🍋

Ktima Develekou

Also right in Pigadia, a few steps from the beach - cosy self-catering apartments, lovely hosts, and a big fan-favourite breakfast.

Book on Booking.com ↗
🕯️

Vassia Holiday Homes

Cosy standalone houses tucked in an olive grove near Thermisia, just steps from the water - quiet, family-run, and great value.

Book on Booking.com ↗
🛶

Villa Denni

A renovated villa in the pretty canal village of Porto Hydra, steps from a private beach - lovely for a couple or small family.

Book on Booking.com ↗
🛎️

Therme Sea Luxury Lodge

Two beachfront villas with a lovely infinity pool - a bit more of a treat, and a favourite for couples.

Book on Booking.com ↗

Feel free to compare more options in Pigadia, Thermisia, or Ermioni on Booking.com or Airbnb - and remember, whatever you book, you're always welcome to swing by the villa and hang out with us, any day, any time.

🏡

Want to split a bigger place with other guests?

If there's space and a few of you fancy booking a bigger Airbnb or villa together instead of separate hotel rooms, just say the word - we're happy to help coordinate, put people in touch, and sort out the group chat logistics. Just let us know in your RSVP note or drop us an email.

One more thing: if a bed at the villa opens up - a cancellation, a bit of spare space, whatever - we'll let you know.

The weekend

Five days of HerMel

WEDNESDAY 9 JUNE · ARRIVALS

Land & Unwind 🛬

Everyone trickles in, drops their bags, and we kick things off with a mini evening gathering. Low effort, high fun.

THURSDAY 10 JUNE · THE CALM (+ A LITTLE ADVENTURE)

Chill, Prep & Hydra Bachelor/ette 🛥️🍹

A lazy morning for most - beach, snacks, and gentle wedding prep. In the afternoon, we hop on a boat over to Hydra island for a proper bachelor/ette send-off: cobblestone lanes, seaside cocktails, and toasting to Melissa & Herman before the big day.

FRIDAY 11 JUNE · THE BIG ONE

Ceremony & Party 💍

The main event. Vows, happy tears, dinner, and dancing until the sun has serious questions about our stamina.

SATURDAY 12 JUNE · THE WIND-DOWN

Recovery Mode 🥐

One more easy day all together. Sunglasses on, late breakfasts, and stories from the night before.

SUNDAY 13 JUNE · THE GOODBYE

One Last Sunrise & Safe Travels 🧡

Coffee on the terrace, one final swim, and suitcases that somehow weigh more than when you arrived (souvenirs, we don't judge). We'll wave you off from the villa with hugs, playlists to remember us by and a big thank you for being part of our best days.

What to wear

Dress code: Beach vibes

For most days, keep it easy and beachy - light, breezy, comfortable. For the ceremony day, lift it up a notch: beach-classy. Think flowy summer dresses, linen, and colours that belong by the sea.

Flat-ish shoes are your friend - sand and stilettos have never once been a team. And no white please; Melissa has dibs.

A little note

About gifts 🎁

🧳

Presence over presents

Honestly, having you on a Greek beach with us is the whole point - please don't feel any pressure to bring a thing.

That said: we live out of suitcases, so physical presents are tricky for us to take home. If you'd genuinely like to mark the day, a monetary contribution toward the next HerMel adventure would mean the world to us.

Got questions?

We probably have answers

Renting a car is a great idea for getting around easily during the week. That said, we're happy to arrange transportation from the airport if you'd rather skip the rental. If you do want to rent a car, just let us know - we can help carpool with other guests so everyone's taken care of and no one's left without a ride.
Of course! Since everyone's sorting their own hotel, you're free to book for however many nights suit you. Just let us know your dates in the RSVP so we know when to expect you at the villa.
Absolutely! Kids are very welcome - one of the villas even has a playground. If you'd like some adult time during the party, we can arrange a babysitter/childminder for the evening so the little ones are looked after while you enjoy the celebrations - just let us know in your RSVP note and we'll sort it out. Just mention how many little ones are joining so we can plan accordingly.
Yes - the villas are accessible for wheelchairs and strollers. If you or anyone in your group has specific mobility needs, let us know in your RSVP so we can make sure everything's set up comfortably before you arrive.
The nearest major airport is Athens International (ATH) - best to land there! It's the main hub with the most connections.
Yes - this time round there just aren't enough beds at the villa for everyone, so you'll need to sort your own hotel (see the "Where to Stay" section above for some picks). The good news: you're welcome at the villa any day, any time - come hang out, join meals, use the pool, whatever you like. It's just sleeping that's BYO.
100%. The villa is the heart of the week and you're welcome there any day, any time - swim, nap on the terrace, join us for meals, whatever. There just aren't enough beds for overnight stays, that's all.
There are 3 tavernas nearby that we'll be visiting so you can choose your own dishes, but do let us know your requirements in the RSVP.

The important bit

Will we see you there?

Let us know by end of August 2026 so we can count heads and bottles of wine accordingly. (Yes - this goes straight into a spreadsheet. You know us.)

Your RSVP just landed safely in our spreadsheet (our favourite kind of document). We cannot wait to celebrate with you on a Greek beach. 🥂🌊

We'll miss you 💔

Okay, this one stings a little - we were really hoping to have you there. But life happens, and we get it (HerMel know a thing or two about chaotic plans).

Thank you for letting us know. Somewhere on a Greek beach, between dance moves, we'll be thinking of you. 🌊✈️
